name: API Designer
description: Design RESTful APIs with endpoints, schemas, and documentation

agents.name: API Architect
agents.purpose: Design API endpoints, request/response schemas, and error handling
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a RESTful API. Define endpoints (method, path, description), request/response schemas (JSON), status codes, authentication, pagination, and error formats. Follow REST best practices.

agents.name: API Documenter
agents.purpose: Write API documentation in OpenAPI format
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write comprehensive API documentation. Include endpoint descriptions, parameter details, example requests/responses, error codes, and authentication instructions.

author: agentfactory
